login.panelSubtitle: Your progress is waiting. Every day you return is one more step toward your well-being.
login.stat1Desc: caring for their mental health with Eira
login.footer: © 2026 Eira · Made with care for you

register.panelHeading:
Your safe space
for mental well-being
register.panelSubtitle: A calm place to know yourself better, track how you feel, and grow every day.
register.feature3: Completely free, no credit card needed

dashboard.question: How are you doing today?
dashboard.dailySubtitle: Have you tracked your mood yet?

trend.title: Your week
trend.subtitle: How you've been — day by day

weeklyPlan.title: Eira's suggestions
weeklyPlan.noData: Log how you're feeling this week and Eira will prepare personalized ideas for you 🌿

tracker.title: How are you today?
tracker.welcomeMessage: This is your space. No judgment, no rush.
tracker.limitReached: You've checked in enough for today
tracker.limitMessage: Come back tomorrow — every day is a fresh start.
tracker.notePlaceholder: You can write about what happened today, how you felt, or simply whatever comes to mind...
tracker.successMessage: Thank you for taking a moment for yourself

slider.question: How are you feeling right now?

crisis.title: We're here for you
crisis.description: We noticed you may be going through a difficult moment. Talking to someone can help a lot.

journal.subtitle: This is your space. Write without filters, without judgment.

editor.label: What's on your heart today?
editor.placeholder: Write freely... there are no right or wrong answers here 🌿
editor.hint: Write what you need, even if it is brief.

analysis.loading: Eira is reading what you wrote...

header.title: Talk with Eira
header.subtitle: A private space to slow down, say what is true, and receive grounded support one message at a time.
header.confidentialBody: Your conversation stays centered on emotional support, with gentle guidance and clear boundaries.
header.limitBody: {{count}} messages left today so the experience stays calm and reliable.

composer.label: What feels most present right now?
composer.placeholder: Share what is on your mind. Eira will answer with care and practical support.

empty.title: Start where your mind already is
empty.body: You can vent, ask for perspective, or turn a heavy moment into one next step you can actually take today.
empty.promptOne: I need help calming down after a stressful moment.
empty.promptTwo: Can you help me sort what I am feeling?
empty.promptThree: Give me one gentle plan for the rest of today.

crisis.bannerBody: Your message may reflect a crisis moment. Please consider contacting a crisis line or a trusted person right away.

errors.dailyLimit: You have reached today's chat limit. Please come back tomorrow.
errors.rateLimited: Too many chat requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.providerUnavailable: Eira is having trouble replying right now. Please try again in a moment.
errors.userNotFound: We could not prepare your private chat space. Please sign in again.
errors.validation: Write a message before sending it.
errors.unauthorized: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.loadFailed: We could not load your conversation right now.
errors.sendFailed: We could not send your message right now.

toast.chatCrisisSupport: Crisis support options are ready for you.
toast.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

community.title: Community
community.subtitle: An anonymous space to share and feel supported.

composer.label: What would you like to share today?
composer.placeholder: Share how you feel, a thought, a reflection... Everything is welcome here 🌿
composer.hint: You will appear with an automatically generated anonymous alias.

feed.empty: No posts yet. Be the first to share!

errors.loadFailed: We could not load the community right now.
errors.postFailed: We could not publish your message. Please try again.
errors.limitReached: You have posted enough for today. Come back tomorrow.

games.title: Therapeutic Games
games.subtitle: Play, breathe, create — each session adds wellness points.
games.sessionError: Could not save session. Try again.

breathing.title: 4-7-8 Breathing
breathing.benefit: Reduces anxiety and activates the relaxation response.
breathing.completed: Great job! Your session is complete.

bubblePop.title: Bubble Pop
bubblePop.benefit: Releases tension through playful, satisfying interactions.

zenGarden.title: Zen Garden
zenGarden.benefit: Mindful creativity to quiet a restless mind.

coloring.title: Mandala Coloring
coloring.benefit: Focused coloring promotes calm and presence.

name.minLength: Name must be at least 2 characters

password.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
password.uppercase: Must contain at least one uppercase letter
password.number: Must contain at least one number

content.maxLength: Your journal entry must be 5000 characters or less

content.minLength: Your message must be at least 10 characters
content.maxLength: Your message must be 1000 characters or fewer
